name: status-report
description: Markdown sibling of the status report: highlights, in-progress work, blockers, steering metrics, and next-up items for a reporting period. The agent pre-renders each collection (highlights/inProgress/blockers/metrics/nextUp) into a bullet list before substitution.

slots.description: Small overline label above the title.
Reporting period, e.g. 'Week of YYYY-MM-DD — YYYY-MM-DD'.
Pre-rendered extra header meta (cadence, author) as an inline list.
Pre-rendered bullet list of the few things worth knowing; prefix each with its marker variant (default/warn/alert) as appropriate.
Pre-rendered bullet list of active tasks with name, sub-note, progress percent, and owner.
Pre-rendered bullet list of items needing help or a decision, with owner and severity.
Pre-rendered list of KPI rows: label, value, and optional week-over-week delta.
Pre-rendered bullet list of planned tasks for the upcoming period with owner.
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.

shape.inProgress[]: { name: string, sub: string, progress: string|number, owner: string }
shape.blockers[]: { variant: enum[default,warn], title: string, owner: string, description: string }
shape.metrics[]: { label: string, value: string, delta: string, delta_dir: enum[up,down,none] }
